case_title: HIGGINS, ARTHUR VS H & H RECOVERY, INC. RA #1019/1232 MADERA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HIGGINS, ARTHUR AS TO DEFENDANT H & H RECOVERY, INC. RA #1019/1232 MADERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-04-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-07-2003 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT H & H RECOVERY, INC. RA #1019/1232 MADERA

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-04-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-05-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFT TO RETURN PLTF'S PERSONAL PROPERTY INCL. BUT NOT LIMITED TO TRAINING HURDLES, MANUALS, STARTING BLOCKS, UNIFORMS. IF PROPERTY RETURNED, NO APPEAR- ANCE REQ'D; CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE -
- IF PLTF APPEARS & PROPERTY HAS NOT BEEN RETURNED, JUDGMENT FOR PLTF IN AMOUNT OF $5000 WILL BE RENDERED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT H & H RECOVERY, INC. RA #1019/1232 MADERA SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARNCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
